toasts.failed: The language could not be switched.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.body: We could not load this screen. Your data is safe. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist, or you do not have access to it.

accountDisabled.title: Account deactivated
accountDisabled.body: A CECODES administrator deactivated your account. Get in touch if you think this is a mistake.

companyInactive.title: Empresa deactivated
companyInactive.body: A CECODES administrator deactivated your company. Its data is kept. Contact CECODES to reactivate it.

brand.headline: Measure and manage your company's carbon footprint.
brand.tagline: Calculate your Alcance 1, 2 and 3 emissions and see them on a clear dashboard.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register your company to calculate its carbon footprint.
register.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Open it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: We will email you a reset link.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive a link to reset your password.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.accountDisabled: Your account was deactivated. Contact CECODES.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toasts.registerCheckEmail: Account created. Check your email to confirm.

onboarding.title: Set up your company
onboarding.subtitle: Create your empresa and its first sede to start calculating your carbon footprint.

errors.alreadyOnboarded: You already have a company set up.
errors.facilityExists: A sede with that name already exists in this company.
errors.selfOnboardingDisabled: Company setup is handled by CECODES. Contact us to link your account.
errors.generic: The company could not be created. Please try again.

blocked.title: Your account has no company yet
blocked.body: CECODES sets up companies and user accounts. Contact us and we will link your account to your company.

company.title: Company setup
company.subtitle: Define your company profile. These details appear on the reports.
company.profileSubtitle: General details that appear on the reports.
company.name: Company name

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this company.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Carbon footprint · {facility} · Year {year}

kpi.variationIncomplete: Year {year} is incomplete, so this comparison understates the change.

byCategory.title: Emissions by category
byCategory.empty: No categories with data for this filter.

monthly.title: Monthly trend
monthly.subtitle: Electricity (Alcance 2)
monthly.empty: No monthly electricity consumption recorded yet.

comparison.title: Year-over-year comparison
comparison.empty: You need at least two years with data to compare.
comparison.single: Record another year to see the comparison.

targets.title: Target vs. actual by alcance
targets.empty: You have not set reduction targets yet.

dashboard.biogenic: Includes {tonnes} tCO2e biogenic, reported as a memo item.
dashboard.missingGridFactor: The grid electricity factor for {year} is missing: Scope 2 shows zero until an administrator loads it.
dashboard.emptyBody: Create a reporting year and record your source consumption. Your calculated footprint will appear here, by alcance and by category.
dashboard.noYearBody: Record {year}'s consumption to see its footprint.
dashboard.unpricedNote: {count, plural, one {# source could not be calculated} other {# sources could not be calculated}} and was left out of the totals. The totals are incomplete.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Each sede is a planta at a location. Reporting years are recorded per sede.
facilities.dialogSubtitle: The planta and its location identify the sede within the company.
facilities.name: Plant
facilities.emptyBody: Add your first sede to start recording consumption.
facilities.yearCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reporting years} =1 {# reporting year} other {# reporting years}}

deleteDialog.title: Delete this facility?
deleteDialog.body: The sede {name} will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

yearDelete.title: Delete year {year}?
yearDelete.body: This deletes {entries, plural, =0 {all records} =1 {# activity record} other {# activity records}} from year {year} at {facility}. This cannot be undone.

errors.facilityExists: A sede with that name already exists in this company.
errors.facilityHasYears: You cannot delete a sede that has reporting years. Delete its years first, from this same card.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this company.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dataEntry.title: Data entry
dataEntry.subtitle: Record your sources' consumption by alcance. Changes save themselves.
dataEntry.emptyScope: The factor library has no categories for this alcance yet.
dataEntry.valueHint: Non-negative values only. Decimals with a comma (,) or dot (.). Do not use thousands separators.

category.notApplicable: Marked as not applicable. Turn it on to record sources.
category.lockedBySources: To mark it as not applicable, delete its sources first.
category.noSources: No sources added in this category yet.

source.copyJanuary: Copy January to the empty months
source.copyJanuaryNothingEmpty: Every month already has a value.

summary.title: Element summary
summary.missingGridFactor: No grid factor for {year}. Emissions will compute once an administrator loads it.
summary.noFactor: This element has no emission factor loaded.
summary.note: Reference estimate. Official totals are calculated on the Dashboard.

meta.title: Reduction target
meta.label: Target for {scope}
meta.help: Annual target for this alcance, in tonnes of CO2e. Progress will appear on the Dashboard.

validation.format: Enter a non-negative number with up to 6 decimals.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this source?
deleteDialog.body: Recorded values for {element} will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

year.gwpNote: The {gwp} GWP set will be used.

gridFactor.missing: There is no grid electricity factor for {year} yet. You can record consumption; emissions will compute once an administrator loads the factor.

empty.noFacilityBody: You need at least one sede to record consumption.
empty.noYearBody: Create a reporting year for {facility} and start recording consumption.
empty.noSourcesInScope: Open a category and use "Add source" to record your first consumption.

validation.valueFormat: Enter a non-negative number with up to 6 decimals.
validation.yearMin: That year is too far in the past.
validation.yearMax: That year is too far in the future.

errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this data.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidValue: There is an invalid value. Check the highlighted field.
errors.yearExists: That sede already has that reporting year.
errors.factorUnavailable: That element is no longer available in the factor library.
errors.categoryHasSources: Delete the category's sources before marking it as not applicable.

toasts.januaryCopied: January copied to the empty months.

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Manage companies and work on their data when they need it.
companies.emptyBody: Companies appear here once they register and complete their setup.
companies.dialogSubtitle: Sedes are added later, from the company's workspace.
companies.name: Company name

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate {name}?
deactivateDialog.body: Its users will not be able to sign in until you reactivate it. No data is deleted.

activateDialog.title: Activate {name}?
activateDialog.body: Its users will regain access to the platform.

deleteDialog.title: Delete {name}?
deleteDialog.body: Only companies with no sedes and no users can be deleted. This cannot be undone.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.companyHasData: You cannot delete a company that has sedes or users. Deactivate it instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Accounts with access to the platform.
users.dialogSubtitle: The user can sign in immediately with the temporary password.
users.name: Name
users.tempPasswordHelp: Share it with the person. They can change it through password reset.
users.companyNoneHelp: A user with no company will create their own on first sign in. An admin never has a company.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate {email}?
deactivateDialog.body: They will not be able to sign in or save data until you reactivate them. Their data is kept.

activateDialog.title: Activate {email}?
activateDialog.body: They will regain access to the platform.

deleteDialog.title: Delete {email}?
deleteDialog.body: Their sign-in account and profile will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.cannotEditSelf: You cannot change your own role or deactivate your own account.
errors.companyNotFound: The selected company does not exist.
errors.authFailed: The sign-in account could not be created. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

factors.title: Factor library
factors.subtitle: Emission factors and their version history.
factors.loaded: Loaded: {factors} active factors, {gridFactors} grid electricity factors. Latest version: {version}.
factors.createSubtitle: The element, its unit and its category identify the factor.
factors.editSubtitle: Every change is recorded in the history.

empty.libraryBody: Import the CECODES factor file, or create a factor by hand.
empty.noResultsBody: No factor matches the filters. Try clearing them.

form.identificationHelp: Alcance, category, element and unit identify the factor uniquely.
form.factorsHelp: Use the per-gas factors where they exist. If the factor already comes as CO2e, use the consolidated field.
form.metadataHelp: Source, uncertainty and validity. Recorded with the factor; not shown on the dashboard.
form.factorRequired: Enter at least one emission factor.
form.scope2Note: Alcance 2 takes its factor from the Grid electricity tab, by year. No factor is captured here.

fields.biogenicHelp: Switches the CH4 GWP to its non-fossil value.
fields.activeHelp: An inactive factor disappears from the source picker. Existing records are kept.

history.title: Change history
history.subtitle: Who changed what, and when.
history.empty: This factor has no recorded changes.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate this factor?
deactivateDialog.body: {element} will stop appearing in the source picker. Existing records are kept and still show the element.

activateDialog.title: Activate this factor?
activateDialog.body: {element} will be available again in the source picker.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: The library's change log, mirroring the Excel.
versions.createSubtitle: Record a release of the emission-factor library.

grid.title: Grid electricity factor (SIN)
grid.subtitle: National factor by year. Alcance 2 uses it according to the reporting year.
grid.dialogSubtitle: kg CO2 per kWh consumed, per UPME and XM.

deleteDialog.title: Delete the {year} factor?
deleteDialog.body: Reports for that year will show the missing-factor notice again until you load it back.

validation.factorRequired: Enter at least one emission factor.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.factorExists: A factor with that alcance, category, element and unit already exists.
errors.versionExists: A version with that name already exists.
errors.gridYearExists: A factor for that year already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toasts.noChanges: There are no changes to save.

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Set up a member company, its first facility, and its first user.
onboarding.title: Company details

company.title: Company
company.description: The member company's name and sector.
company.name: Company name

facility.title: First facility (optional)
facility.description: Record the first facility now, or add it later from the company page.
facility.name: Facility name

user.title: First user (optional)
user.description: Create the first user with a temporary password to share.
user.passwordHelp: The user can change it after signing in.

validation.passwordMin: The password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.generic: The action could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.facilityExists: A facility with that name already exists.
errors.emailInUse: That email is already in use.
errors.authFailed: The user could not be created.

summary.title: Company created
summary.subtitle: {company} is ready.
summary.facilityFailed: The facility could not be created: {error}
summary.facilitySkipped: No first facility. You can add it from the company page.
summary.userFailed: The user could not be created: {error}
summary.userSkipped: No first user. You can create one under Users.
summary.credentialsHelp: Share them securely. They will not be shown again.

preview.title: Summary
preview.subtitle: Review every value you entered in one table.
preview.missingGridNote: Year {year} has no electricity grid factor loaded, so Scope 2 cannot be estimated. An admin can load it in the factor library.
preview.biogenicNote: Includes {tonnes} t CO2e from biogenic sources, which the GHG Protocol reports separately.
preview.footnote: Reference estimate. Official totals are calculated on the Dashboard.

changes.title: Change history
changes.subtitle: Who entered or changed each figure, and when.

empty.noFacilityBody: Add a facility to your company to start recording and previewing data.
empty.noYearBody: Create a reporting year in Data entry to see it here.
empty.noDataBody: Record your source consumption in Data entry and it will appear in this table.
